name: Small Bin Labels 3pk Silver - Brightroom™
description:
Elegantly label small bins, boxes and more with the 3-Pack of Small Bin Labels from Brightroom™. This silver-tone label pack is designed in a rectangular shape with a silver frame and a clear space to label, making it easy to identify the contents. Made of metal, this bin label pack is excellent for everyday use.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
